# Table

A data table component for displaying structured tabular data with optional styling features.

## Import

```jsx
import { Table } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Table` | The root table container. |
| `Table.Header` | The table header section (`<thead>`). |
| `Table.Body` | The table body section (`<tbody>`). |
| `Table.Row` | A table row (`<tr>`). |
| `Table.Cell` | A table data cell (`<td>`). |
| `Table.ColumnHeader` | A table column header cell (`<th>`). |
| `Table.Caption` | A caption for the table. |
| `Table.ScrollArea` | A scrollable wrapper for horizontal overflow. |

## Props

### Table

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `variant` | `"line" \| "outline"` | `"line"` | The visual style variant of the table. |
| `size` | `"sm" \| "md" \| "lg"` | `"md"` | The size of the table, affecting cell padding. |
| `striped` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether to alternate row background colors. |
| `showColumnBorder` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether to show vertical borders between columns. |
| `interactive` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether rows highlight on hover. |

## Usage

### Basic Table

```jsx
<Table>
  <Table.Header>
    <Table.Row>
      <Table.ColumnHeader>Name</Table.ColumnHeader>
      <Table.ColumnHeader>Email</Table.ColumnHeader>
      <Table.ColumnHeader>Role</Table.ColumnHeader>
    </Table.Row>
  </Table.Header>
  <Table.Body>
    <Table.Row>
      <Table.Cell>John Doe</Table.Cell>
      <Table.Cell>john@example.com</Table.Cell>
      <Table.Cell>Admin</Table.Cell>
    </Table.Row>
    <Table.Row>
      <Table.Cell>Jane Smith</Table.Cell>
      <Table.Cell>jane@example.com</Table.Cell>
      <Table.Cell>Editor</Table.Cell>
    </Table.Row>
  </Table.Body>
</Table>
```

### Striped and Interactive Table

```jsx
<Table striped interactive>
  <Table.Header>
    <Table.Row>
      <Table.ColumnHeader>Product</Table.ColumnHeader>
      <Table.ColumnHeader>Price</Table.ColumnHeader>
    </Table.Row>
  </Table.Header>
  <Table.Body>
    <Table.Row>
      <Table.Cell>Widget A</Table.Cell>
      <Table.Cell>$10.00</Table.Cell>
    </Table.Row>
    <Table.Row>
      <Table.Cell>Widget B</Table.Cell>
      <Table.Cell>$20.00</Table.Cell>
    </Table.Row>
  </Table.Body>
</Table>
```

### Scrollable Table

```jsx
<Table.ScrollArea>
  <Table>
    {/* wide table content */}
  </Table>
</Table.ScrollArea>
```
